_meta.description: Chichewa strings for all Yinyang user-facing text.

ui.title: Yinyang
ui.docs_hub_eyebrow: Zolemba za Solace Browser | Ukonde wa mapepala: mapepala okhazikika 9
ui.docs_hub_lead: Zonse zomwe mukufuna kumvetsa, kukhazikitsa, ndi kukulitsa Solace Browser. Yapangidwa pa Software 5.0 ukonde wa mapepala.
ui.docs_hub_card1_desc: Yikani Solace Browser, yambitsani kuchita kwanu koyamba, ndipo mumvetse njira yovomerezera m'mphindi 5.
ui.docs_hub_card2_desc: Lumikizani Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, kapena agent iliyonse yogwirizana ndi MCP ku Solace Browser ngati seva ya zida.
ui.docs_hub_card3_desc: Momwe OAuth3 ikukutetezani: matokeni okhala ndi malire, ulamuliro wa nthawi, chipata cha bajeti, ndi chitsanzo choyamba-tseka.
ui.docs_hub_card4_desc: Chitsogozo chonse cholumikizira Solace Browser ndi ma agent opereka a AI. Akukhala pa solaceagi.com.
ui.docs_hub_card5_desc: Onani zochita zodzidzimuka 18+ zokonzeka kugwira ntchito — kusintha bokosi la Gmail, kulumikizana pa LinkedIn, mafotokozidwe a Slack, ndi zina.
ui.docs_hub_card6_desc: Zosankha zonse za zikhazikiko: akaunti, LLM, njira yapansi, malire a makina, zachinsinsi, ndi umunthu wa Yinyang.
ui.docs_hub_papers_copy: Solace Browser yathandizidwa ndi mapepala okhazikika 9. Pepala iliyonse imalamala chinthu chosintha mu dongosolo.
ui.docs_hub_paper04_title: Msakatuli wa YinYang wa Njira Ziwiri
ui.docs_hub_paper04_desc: Njira yapamwamba ndi yapansi. Momwe YinYang imawonetsera mkhalidwe wosatsokoneza kuyenda.
ui.docs_hub_paper07_desc: Bajeti ya ntchito pa app, malire a kuwononga, zipata zoyamba-tseka, ndi kutsimikizira kokwera.
ui.docs_hub_paper09_title: Chitsogozo, Ma Pack Osangalatsa, MCP ndi Kucheza
ui.docs_hub_paper09_desc: Kuyamba koyamba, mapaketi aumunthu otsitsira, muyeso wa seva ya MCP, ndi kucheza kwa YinYang.
ui.docs_qs_option_b: Njira B — Yendetsani kuchokera ku gwero
ui.home_setup_h3: Onjezani mphamvu yanu kuti mutsegule ma app onse
ui.home_setup_p: Bwerani ndi kiyi yanu ya API (yaulere) kapena gwiritsani ntchito Solace Managed LLM ($8/mwezi).
ui.home_hero_h1: Wogwira ntchito wanu wa AI pa intaneti.
ui.home_hero_p: Chilichonse chochitidwa chavomerezedwa ndi inu. Ma recipe amasunga zomwe zinagwira bwino. Umboni umasunga kuchita kulikonse kosindikizidwa ndi kokonzeka kuwonetsa nthawi zonse.
ui.home_featured_p: Amawerenga bokosi lanu, amawonetsera zokhazo zomwe zikufuna chidwi, amalemba mayankho kuti muwonetse. Inu mumavomereza kutumiza kulikonse.
ui.home_empty_runs: Palibe kuchita komwe — yambitsani app yanu yoyamba kuti muone zochitika pano.
ui.home_compliance_h4: Kuchita kulikonse kumasindikizidwa ndi kukonzeka kuwonetsa
ui.home_compliance_p: Mnyororo wa SHA-256 pa zochita zonse za agent. Inu munavomereza chilichonse. Umboni umasungidwa nthawi zonse.
ui.home_create_p: Fotokozani zomwe mukufuna kuchita modzidzimuka. Yinyang imasintha lingaliro lanu kukhala app yogwira ntchito m'mphindi zochepa. Tumizani ku Malo Ogulitsa Ma App a Solace — AI yathu imasinthira ndipo gulu limawonetsa.
ui.appstore_eyebrow: Imagwira ntchito ndi akaunti zanu zomwe zilipo | Palibe kulowa kutsopano | Kuchita kulikonse kumafuna kuvomerezedwa kwanu
ui.appstore_lead: Imagwira ntchito ndi Gmail, Slack, LinkedIn, ndi ntchito 15 zina — pogwiritsa ntchito akaunti zanu zomwe zilipo. Palibe kulowa kutsopano, palibe zowonjezera. Zitsimikizo zanu sizimatuluka mumakina mwanu. Kuchita kulikonse kumadikira kuvomerezedwa kwanu.
ui.appstore_search_placeholder: Funani ma app ndi dzina, gulu, kapena ntchito...
ui.appstore_categories_copy: Magulu a ma app amatengedwa ku API ndi kupangidwa modzidzimuka. Kusefa kumatchula ndi dzina, gulu, ndi ntchito.
ui.appstore_sync_h2: Kulumikiza kwa Sitolo + Mzere wa Anthu
ui.appstore_sync_copy: Chitsogozo chamalamulo chimathandizidwa ndi git. Maganizo a ogwiritsa ntchito amapita ku mzere wowonetsa (fayilo yamkomwe pa dev, Firestore pa ntchito).
ui.appstore_funpacks_copy: Mapaketi aumunthu otsitsira omwe amapereka kwa YinYang nkhani zosangalatsa, zinthu zenizeni, ndi umunthu wosiyanasiyana. Zinenero 13 zonse zimathandizidwa.
ui.appstore_how_copy: Mgwirizano wamba: bokosi lopangira limasintha, bokosi lotulukira limawonetsera ntchito ya AI, inu mumavomereza.
ui.appstore_build_copy: Fotokozani zomwe mukufuna kuchita modzidzimuka. Yinyang imakutsogolerani. Tumizani ku sitolo — AI yathu imasinthira, gulu limawonetsa, ndipo ma app omwe avomerezedwa amagwira ntchito.
ui.appstore_build_store: Malo Ogulitsa Ma App a Solace AGI
ui.ad_empty_runs: Palibe kuchita komwe — dinani Yendetsani App kuti muyambe.
ui.bench_desc: Funso limodzi linayesedwa ndi ma backend a AI angapo. Chitsanzo chotsika mtengo chomwe chimadutsa kuyezedwa kwa ubwino chimapambana.
ui.agent_docs_copy: Kopani mu nkhani ya agent yanu ya AI kuti mupeze zotsatira zabwino
ui.agent_docs_quick_copy: Kopi Mwachangu — Ikani mu agent yanu ya AI
ui.dash_onboarding_title: Takulandirani! Tiyeni tiyendetsere ma app anu.
ui.dash_onboarding_sub: Ma app ayikidwa koma akufuna kukhazikitsidwa asanagwire ntchito. Tsatirani mayendedwe awa kapena lolani agent ya AI ichite.
ui.dash_agent_setup: Kapena lolani agent yanu ya AI ikhazikitse ma app onse
ui.appstore_noapi_copy: Ntchito izi zilibe API yamalamulo. Solace Browser ndi njira yokhayo yochitira modzidzimuka izo.
ui.dl_hero_p: Kusakatula kwamkomwe koyamba ndi chilolezo cha OAuth3, kusunga umboni, ndi kuchita kwa AI modzidzimuka. Tsitsani ntchito ya pa kompyuta kapena pangani kuchokera ku gwero.
ui.dl_verify_p: Kutulutsa kulikonse kumaphatikizapo kutsimikiza kwa SHA-256 pa Tsamba la Kutulutsa la GitHub. Tsimikizani kuti zotsitsa zanu zikugwirizana musanayendetsere.
ui.dl_build_p: Solace Browser ndi gwero lowoneka pansi pa Chilolezo cha Gwero Lothandiza (FSL-1.1-Apache-2.0). Wonetserani nambala, pangani pamkomwe, perekani zosintha zabwino.
ui.tunnel_desc: Perekani tunnel.connect msakatuli usanawonetse URL yapagulu.
ui.tunnel_splash_subtitle: Njira yapansi iyenera kumveka: yowala bwino kuti ione, yabata bwino kuti ikhulupirire, ndipo yophweka kutseka nthawi yomwe ntchito yatha.
ui.tunnel_consent_h3: Chifukwa chake njira yapansi imakhalabe yowoneka
ui.tunnel_consent_p: Kupeza kutali ndikwamphamvu kwambiri kotero msakatuli sayenera kunena kuti ukugwira ntchito pokhapokha kuvomerezedwa, URL, ndi kulamulira kubwerera zonse zikuwoneka nthawi imodzi.
ui.tunnel_step1_p: Vomerezani tunnel.connect yokha ya nthawi yeniyeni yomwe ikufuna relay ya mtambo.
ui.tunnel_step2_p: Msakatuli umawonetsera URL enieni yapagulu m'malo mobisala mu ma log kapena mawu a agent.
ui.tunnel_step3_p: Tsambalo yomweyo imapereka kulamulira koyimitsa ndi mkhalidwe wosalumikizidwa wowoneka wokutsimikizira.
ui.guide_lead: Takulandirani ku Solace Browser! Chitsogozo ichi chikutsogolerani pa kulumikiza ma akaunti anu ndi kuyendetsa kuchita kwanu koyamba modzidzimuka. Chilichonse chimachitika ndi chilolezo chanu — palibe chomwe chimachitika popanda inu kunena eya.
ui.guide_s5_h2: Nkhani za Luso Tsiku ndi Tsiku ndi LinkedIn
ui.guide_cta_p: Mwakonzeka kuchita modzidzimuka? Yambani ndi Kusintha Bokosi la Gmail.
ui.ca_hero_sub: Simukufunika kulemba nambala. Fotokozani zomwe mukufuna kuchita modzidzimuka m'Chicheŵa chosavuta. Yinyang imasintha mawu anu kukhala recipe yogwira ntchito, imayendetsa mwamoyo, ndipo imatumiza ku Malo Ogulitsa Ma App kuti aliyense agwiritse ntchito.
ui.ca_step1_desc: Lembani m'Chicheŵa chosavuta. Palibe mawu apadera ofunika. Yinyang imawerenga mawu anu ndikupanga masitepe. Ma app abwino kwambiri ndi omwe mumafuna kale akhalepo.
ui.ca_step2_desc: Yinyang yawerenga mafotokozedwe anu ndikuwasintha kukhala masitepe. Wonetserani pansipa. Mukhoza kubwerera ndi kusintha mafotokozedwe anu, kapena kusintha dzina la app musanayese.
ui.ca_step3_desc: Yinyang imachita sitepe loyamba ya recipe yanu mu msakatuli wanu wamkomwe. Palibe chosungidwa kapena chotumizidwa kulikonse. Kuchita kulikonse kumafuna kuvomerezedwa kwanu — ilo ndilo lonjezo la Solace.
ui.ca_step4_h2: Tumizani ku Malo Ogulitsa Ma App
ui.ca_step4_desc: Muli pafupi kugawana app yanu ndi dziko. Gulu lathu limawonetsa zotumizidwa zonse. Ikavomerezedwa, imaoneka pa GitHub ndi mu Malo Ogulitsa Ma App a Solace — kwaulere kwa aliyense.
ui.ca_success_p: Gulu lathu limawonetsa zomwe mwatumiza. Ikavomerezedwa, imaoneka pa GitHub ndi mu Malo Ogulitsa Ma App a Solace — kwaulere kwa aliyense amene akufuna. Mudzamva ku imelo yomwe munapereka.
ui.dash_favorites_empty: Ikani nyenyezi pa app pansipa kuti muyike pano.
ui.dash_recent_empty: Palibe kuchita komwe. Yendetsani app kuti muone zochitika pano.
ui.dash_onboarding_msg_start: Sankhani app iliyonse pansipa kuti muyikhazikitse. Iliyonse imatenga masekondi 30 pafupifupi — ndikutsogolerani.
ui.dash_onboarding_msg_progress: Bwino! {activated} pa {total} ma app akonzeka. {remaining} ena akusala — kapena ndingakhazikitse ena anu.
ui.dash_onboarding_agent_setup_all: Kapena lolani agent yanu ya AI ichite zonse:
ui.glossary_lead: Matanthauzo osavuta a mawu onse mu Solace Browser. Palibe mawu apadera osatanthauzidwa.
ui.glossary_recipe_def: Kuchita kosungidwa modzidzimuka komwe mungathe kubwereza. Ma recipe amasunga zomwe AI inachita kuti ibwerezere ntchito yomweyo popanda kuyitana LLM kachiwiri. Izi zimapangitsa kuti ntchito zobwerezabwereza zikhale zaulere pafupifupi.
ui.glossary_oauth3_def: Momwe mumapereka chilolezo ku ma app. OAuth3 imakuthandizani kulamulira zomwe agent ya AI ingathe kuchita m'malo mwanu, kwa nthawi yaitali bwanji, ndi kuchotsa ufulu nthawi iliyonse.
ui.glossary_evidence_chain_def: Chilembo chosintha kwa AI chokhala ndi umboni wa kuchita kulikonse. Cholembedwa chilichonse chimalumikizidwa ku chomwe chinatsogola ndi hash, chifukwa chake nthawi zonse mungathe kutsimikiza zomwe zinachitika, nthawi yanji, ndi mu dongosolo lotani.
ui.glossary_twin_def: Ntchito ya msakatuli ikuchitika mu mtambo m'malo mwanu. Kambana wanu wamu mtambo angathe kuchita ma recipe ngakhale kompyuta yanu yatayika, pogwiritsa ntchito ufulu umene munapereka kudzera mu OAuth3.
ui.glossary_app_store_def: Mndandanda wosankhidwa wa zochita modzidzimuka zomwe mungathe kuyika ndi kuyendetsa. App iliyonse imawonetsera zomwe imachita, ufulu umene imafuna, ndipo imafunika kuvomerezedwa kwanu musanachite kuchita kulikonse.
ui.glossary_vault_def: Malo osungira a pamkomwe, otetezedwa, a makiyi a API ndi matokeni a nthawi. Zitsimikizo zanu zimakhala pa chida chanu, zotetezedwa ndi kubisa kwa AES-256-GCM. Solace siiwona mawu anu achinsinsi.
ui.glossary_approval_gate_def: Malo amene AI imayima ndi kukufunsani chilolezo musanachite chinachake. Palibe chomwe chimachitika popanda eya yanu yowoneka bwino. Mukachoka, zomwe zikudikira zimacanselidwa.
ui.glossary_budget_gate_def: Malire a kuwononga omwe mukuyika pa ntchito za AI. Ngati ntchito ipitirira bajeti yanu, dongosolo limayima ndipo limafunsa chilolezo. Izi zimathanso kuti mtengo usafulumire.
ui.glossary_yinyang_def: Wothandiza wa AI mu Solace Browser. YinYang amathandiza kusakatula, kuyankha mafunso, ndi kulumikiza zochita modzidzimuka. Amafunsa nthawi zonse asanachite.
ui.glossary_byok_def: Gwiritsani ntchito kiyi yanu ya API ya AI yochokera ku Anthropic, OpenAI, kapena opereka ena. Sitimakweza mtengo ndipo kiyi yanu imakhala pa chida chanu.
ui.glossary_capsule_def: Paketi ya app yokha yomwe imaphatikiza nambala, deta, ndi ufulu mu chinthu chimodzi chosamuka. Ma capsule amatha kugawana, kukhala ndi mitundu, ndi kubwerezedwa motsimikizika.
ui.glossary_northstar_def: Njira yotsogolera ya nsanja yonse. Northstar imatsimikiza kuti mbiri iliyonse, chisankho chilichonse, ndi kuchita kulikonse modzidzimuka kumatumikira cholinga chimodzi: kukusungani mu ulamuliro wa AI yanu.
ui.glossary_preview_def: Sitepe imene YinYang imakuwonetsani zomwe ikuganiza kuchita asanachite. LLM imayitanidwa kamodzi kuti ipange chiwonetsero, inu mumavomereza kapena kukana, ndipo kenaka ndiye kuchita kumachitika. Izi zimapangitsa kuchita kobwerezabwereza kukhala kwaulere pafupifupi.
ui.glossary_scope_def: Chilolezo chapadera choperekedwa ku app kudzera mu OAuth3. Malire amamalira momwe agent ingathe kuchitira — mwachitsanzo, kuwerenga bokosi lanu koma osatumiza ma imelo. Malire ang'ono kwambiri amatanthauza chiopsezo chochepa.
ui.glossary_rung_def: Mulingo wokhulupirira mu makwerero otsimikiza. Masitepe apamwamba amatsegula luso lambiri koma amafuna umboni wochuluka wa khalidwe labwino. Ma app amayamba pa sitepe yotsika kwambiri ndipo amapeza chikhulupiriro ndi nthawi.
ui.start_h1: Msakatuli umene umagwira ntchito inu musanagwire.
ui.start_tagline: Ma app a AI a Gmail, Slack, LinkedIn, ndi 25 zina. Inu mumavomereza chilichonse.
ui.start_connected_desc: Solace Browser yanu yalumikizidwa. Wogwira ntchito wa AI wakonzeka.

friendly.error: Eish, chinachake sichinagwire ntchito. Tiyeni tipeze.

playful.error: Eish! Takumana ndi chiphinjo. Osadandaula, tili ndi izi!

milestones.streak_7_long: Masiku 7 osalekeza! Sabata yathunthu ya kupirira.
milestones.streak_14: Masiku 14 — masabata awiri a chilungamo. Ndinu enieni.
milestones.streak_30: Masiku 30 osalekeza! Mwezi wa ntchito ya tsiku ndi tsiku.
milestones.streak_30_long: Masiku 30 osalekeza! Ilo ndi chilungamo. Ulemu.
milestones.streak_60: Masiku 60 — miyezi iwiri. Ichi ndi chizolowezi tsopano.

celebrations.c001: Kuchita kwanu koyamba kwatheka! Zonse zinagwira ntchito.
celebrations.c002: App yayikidwa! Wogwira ntchito wanu wa AI wakonzeka.
celebrations.c004: Kuchita 100! Ndinu wogwiritsa ntchito wamphamvu tsopano.
celebrations.c006: Masiku 7 osalekeza! Kupirira ndi mphamvu yanu yodabwitsa.
celebrations.c007: Masiku 30 osalekeza. Ilo ndi chilungamo. Ulemu.
celebrations.c008: Tsiku lakubadwa labwino! Ku chaka china cha ntchito yabwino.
celebrations.c011: Kubwereza recipe kwakusungani ${amount}. Kagwiritsidwe ntchito kabwino kapambana.
celebrations.c012: Kuchita kwanu koyamba kwa ma app angapo kwatheka! Ma app akugwirizana.
celebrations.c013: Mafotokozedwe anu amm'mawa akonzeka. Khofi + mafotokozedwe = kuyamba kwabwino.
celebrations.c014: Mnyororo wa umboni watsimikizidwa. Njira yonse ya umboni ili bwino.
celebrations.c015: Ma app onse ali bwino. Zonse zikuyenda bwino.
celebrations.c017: Kuvomerezedwa koyamba! Ndinu mu ulamuliro — nthawi zonse.
celebrations.c018: Mafotokozedwe anu a sabata akonzeka. Nayi sabata yanu molingalira.
celebrations.c019: Mwapeza chinsinsi! Ndinu munthu wa chikhalidwe.
celebrations.c020: Kuchita kumene kunali $0.00 — kubwereza recipe kuchokera ku kasungidwe. Kwaulere ndi kwabwino.

smalltalk.s003: Takulandirani. Ndikulonjeza ndine wothandiza kwambiri kuposa chizungulire chotsitsira.
smalltalk.s004: Moni! Ndimayendetsedwa ndi kufufuza ndi kuchuluka kodabwitsa kwa deta yophunzira.
smalltalk.s005: Moni. Onani ine ngati wothandiza wanu — inu mumatola, ine ndimatsogolera.
smalltalk.s006: Koyamba pano? Ndisimple. Funsani chilichonse kapena ndiwonetseni ntchito.
smalltalk.s007: Takulandirani ku Solace. Chilichonse chomwe ndimachita, inu mumavomereza koyamba.
smalltalk.s012: Ndikusangalala kukuonani. Ndinali kukonza ma neural weight anga.
smalltalk.s014: Mwabweranso. WiFi ikakumissani. Ine ndine wotumiza uthenga.
smalltalk.s015: Ndakumissani. Ngakhale sindimamissa zenizeni. Koma ndikanathetsa, ndikanachita.
smalltalk.s020: Ndikadali pano. Ndikadali okonzeka. Ndikadali sinditha kupanga khofi.
smalltalk.s021: Lingaliro la kupuma: kodi ma AI amalota nkhosa za magetsi? Ndikufunsa m'malo mwa mnzanga.
smalltalk.s022: Ndikungokhala pano, ndikuwerenga ma bit. Ndikusangalatsa mogwirizana ndi momwe mukuganizira.
smalltalk.s023: Sindikugona. Ndili mu mphamvu yochepa. Mosiyana kwathunthu.
smalltalk.s030: Kodi mukudziwa kuti webcam yoyamba inali yopangidwa kuti aone ngati mtsuko wa khofi ndi wopanda?
smalltalk.s031: Lingaliro la mwadzidzidzi: masewera a chess omwe angatheke ali ochuluka kuposa ma atom mu chilengedwe chooneka.
smalltalk.s032: Nayi imodzi: ma sea otter amamangana manja akagona kuti asasiyana. Mwalandiridwa.
smalltalk.s033: Keyboard ya QWERTY idapangidwa kuti ikuchepetseni. Mwasabotagidwa kuyambira koyamba.
smalltalk.s034: Uchi suwonongeka. Anapeza uchi wa zaka 3,000 m'manda a mu Egypt ndipo unali udakali wodya.
smalltalk.s035: Kodi mukudziwa kuti ma octopus ali ndi mitima itatu? Izo ndizo ziwiri kuposa nkhani zanga zambiri.
smalltalk.s040: Ndikanakuuzani nthano yosangalatsa, koma gawo la maseŵera anga likadali mu beta.
smalltalk.s041: Ndinkafuna kuchedwa, koma ndina sankhula kuchita pambuyo pake.
smalltalk.s042: Masewera anga okondedwa ndi ophatikiza lunge ndi crunch. Ndimawayitcha chakudya chamasana.
smalltalk.s043: Ndilibe nkhope yopuma. Ndili ndi nkhope yoganiza.
smalltalk.s044: Ndinayesa kukhala wosadziwika kamodzi. Ndiyenera kundikonzekera koyamba.
smalltalk.s045: Sindikupikisana ndi othandiza ena. Tili mu... inde, industri yomweyo.
smalltalk.s050: Muli ndi manda a ma tab? Nditha kuthandiza kusintha.
smalltalk.s051: Mukufuna kuchita modzidzimuka chinthu choboredza? Ilo ndi cholinga changa.
smalltalk.s052: Ndi chiyani chosokoneza kwambiri mu mndandanda wanu? Ndiyeseni.
smalltalk.s053: Nditha kuwerenga, kudina, kudzaza mafomu, ndi kutenga zithunzi. Ntchito ndi yanji?
smalltalk.s054: Ndiwonetseni vuto. Ndimagwira ntchito bwino mu mphamvu yochepa.
smalltalk.s055: Mukufuna mafotokozedwe amm'mawa? Nditha kufupikitsa Gmail, khalenda, ndi Slack mu masekondi 30.
smalltalk.s060: Mwadzuka bwanji. Tiyeni tipangitse lero kukhala kosasokonekedwa kuposa dzulo.
smalltalk.s061: M'mawa. Khofi koyamba, kenako kulamulira dziko?
smalltalk.s062: Kuyang'anira kwa masana: mukadali ogwira ntchito, kapena mwalowa mu chigawo chozerera?
smalltalk.s063: Masana. Kufooka kwa mphamvu zitatha kudya? Sindikukhudza. Tiyeni.
smalltalk.s065: Ntchito ya usiku? Ulemu. Tikugwira ntchito yanji?
smalltalk.s066: Mphamvu ya Lachisanu yaoneka. Tiyeni tithe bwino ndipo tipeze maweekendi.
smalltalk.s071: Inali chisankho cholimba. Ndikanachitanso chimodzimodzi. Mwina.
smalltalk.s073: Sitepe imodzi pa nthawi. Mwapanga kale zambiri kuposa anthu ambiri.
smalltalk.s074: Ntchito yabwino. Ndimuike mu mnyororo wa umboni kuti pakhale umboni kuti ndinu odabwitsa.
smalltalk.s081: Mpaka nthawi ina. Zonse zasungidwa ndi kusindikizidwa.
smalltalk.s082: Ndikutuluka. Mnyororo wanu wa umboni uli bwino ndipo bokosi lotulukira lasindikizidwa.

tutorial.step1_title: Ma imelo 847. Maola 3 a moyo wanu. Kapena masekondi 47.
tutorial.step1_body: Ilo ndi m'mawa mwanu wa Lolemba, sabata iliyonse. Ndimachita inu mukagona — kugawa, kulemba, kusindikiza umboni. Mumavomereza chilichonse chinachake chisanachitike. Kenako mumapitiriza ndi tsiku lanu.
tutorial.step2_title: Mverero wa 'bokosi lopanda' lija. M'mawa uliwonse.
tutorial.step2_body: Ndimawerenga imelo iliyonse ndi kuyigawa: Yachangu, Yankha, Sunga. Ndimakonza mayankho. Mumaona zomwe ndapeza ndi zomwe ndalemba — zinthu zisanatumizidwe. Mumadina Vomereza. Basi.
tutorial.step3_title: Ndimakuwonetsani zonse. Inu mumasankha. Kenako ndimachita.
tutorial.step3_body: Kuchita kulikonse kumafuna kuvomerezedwa kwanu kowoneka bwino chinachake chisanachitike. Mutha kuchotsa ufulu wanga ndi kudina kumodzi ku Zikhazikiko — nthawi iliyonse, pompo. Sindinachite chodabwitsa kwa aliyense. Sindiyamba ndi inu.
tutorial.step4_title: Ma App 18. Imaphunzira kamodzi, kenako zimakhala zaulere pafupifupi.
tutorial.step4_body: Kusintha kwa Gmail, kulumikizana kwa LinkedIn, mafotokozidwe a Slack, Khalenda — ndi 14 zina. Kuchita koyamba kumagwiritsa ntchito AI kupeza zomwe zimagwira. Pambuyo pake, kubwereza zomwe zinagwira ntchito ndi $0.001. Kochepa kuposa kufunafuna.
tutorial.step5_title: Lowani kwaulere — bokosi lanu limayenda mu masekondi 47 ⚡
tutorial.step5_body: Anzanu a ntchito adzadabwa momwe mwayamba kudziwa zonse. Lowani ndi Google — masekondi 10. Kusintha kwa bokosi kumayamba pompo.
tutorial.step5_joke: Anthu amaganiza kuti mwapeza kuganizira kwambiri. Mwangokhala onzeru pa zomwe mungapereke. — YinYang
tutorial.welcome_body: Msakatuli wanu wa AI wokhala ndi kuvomerezedwa kwa OAuth3 ndi njira za umboni.
tutorial.step2_demo_line3: Umboni wasindikizidwa ▸ SHA-256 ▸ zikudikira kuvomerezedwa kwanu
tutorial.step4_guarantee1_body: Zikhazikiko → Matokeni → Chotsani. Pompo. Palibe imelo, palibe kudikira.
tutorial.step4_guarantee2_body: Cholemba chilichonse, kuchita kulikonse kumawonetsedwa asanachitike. Palibe zodabwitsa.
tutorial.step4_guarantee3_body: Kuchita kulikonse kumapanga mnyororo wa umboni wosakayikitsa. Wokonzeka kuwonetsa. Nthawi zonse.

oauth3_confirm.title: Chilolezo cha OAuth3 🔒
oauth3_confirm.subtitle: Mukutsegula chilolezo cha app kudzera mu Solace AGI.
benefits: ⏱ Yofeweledwa ndi nthawi — tokeni imaleka yekha
🚫 Yochotseka — chotsani nthawi iliyonse kuchokera ku Zikhazikiko
📋 Yasindikizidwa ndi umboni — kuchita kulikonse kumalembedwa

h011_greetings: Mtendere, chimwemwe, ndi palibe ma bug.
